case_title: J YO WONG VS. IRENE OREYNOSEO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-30-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, J YO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OREYNOSEO, IRENE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
